narrative:
Precinct Vermilion City 1-A (precinct in Lorain County) has 759 registered voters, with 55.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.5%, a modest Democratic lean of 2.4 percentage points.
